debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
X : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Zero (Fin n)
inst✝ : DiffeologicalSpace X
hm : @IsDiffeologicalManifold n X inst✝
x : X
u : Set X
hu : IsOpen u
hxu : x ∈ u
i : Unit
v : Set (Eucl n)
hv : IsOpen v
d : ↑u ᵈ≃ ↑v
⊢ ∃ u, IsOpen u ∧ x ∈ u ∧ ∃ i v, IsOpen v ∧ Nonempty (↑u ᵈ≃ ↑v)

failed_attempts:
let u' := d ⁻¹' (v ∩ B)

    simp [f, e₀, y]
    have : dist w y < 1 := (Set.mem_inter_iff.1 hwB).2.trans_le (min_le_right _ _)
    exact (abs_lt.1 ((dist_pi_apply_le w y 0).trans_lt this)).1.le.trans (by simp)

    ⟨hxu, hε, (Metric.mem_ball _ _ _).2 (by simp [ε', hε])⟩, (), v', ?_, ⟨?_⟩⟩
  · rw [dTop_eq]; exact (f.isOpenMap_dsmooth (hv.inter (isOpen_ball _ _))).preimage continuous_subtype_val
  · exact (d.restrict (v ∩ B)).trans ((f.restrict (v ∩ B)).trans (DDiffeomorph.Set.image_subtype_val hBf))
sorry⟩

refine ⟨d ⁻¹' B, (dTop_eq X ▸ hu).preimage d.dsmooth.continuous Metric.isOpen_ball, ⟨x, hxu, by simp⟩,
    (), v', (dTop_eq _ ▸ Metric.isOpen_ball).preimage (continuous_id.add continuous_const), ⟨d'
sorry⟩

⟨hxu, by simp [y]
